message:
Fix cuid2 generator initialization

Remove custom random function that had an off-by-one bug (dividing by
0xffffffff instead of 0x100000000, producing [0,1] instead of [0,1)).
The default init() uses crypto.getRandomValues correctly. Lazy init
pattern still avoids Cloudflare's module-load crypto restriction.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/cuimjprt88
